hooks.command: grep -qE 'patch_measure\.ps1|restore_measure\.ps1' && cd /mnt/d/pbirs-report && powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/eval_measures.ps1 && WIN_TEMP=$(powershell.exe -Command 'Write-Host $env:TEMP' 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r') && WSL_TEMP=$(wslpath "$WIN_TEMP") && python3 scripts/generate_preview.py "$WSL_TEMP/pbirs_measures.json" "$WSL_TEMP/pbirs_preview.html" && explorer.exe "$(wslpath -w "$WSL_TEMP/pbirs_preview.html")"; true
